hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const f=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||'';const cwd=process.cwd();if(f&&path.resolve(f).startsWith(cwd+path.sep)&&fs.existsSync(f)){const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const m=c.match(/console\.log/g);if(m&&m.length>0){console.error('[Hook] Found '+m.length+' console.log statements. Remove before committing.');}}"
hooks.description: Warn about console.log statements in edited files

hooks.command: node -e "console.error('[Hook] Pre-push check: Ensure all tests pass and code review is complete before pushing.');"
hooks.description: Remind to verify before git push
Run security scan before commit — blocks on CRITICAL findings

hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||'';if(f){console.log('[Hook] TypeScript file edited. Run type check after edits.');}"
hooks.description: Remind to type-check after TypeScript edits

hooks.command: node -e "console.log('[Hook] Test file created. Remember to run: npm test');"
hooks.description: Remind to run tests after creating test files
Extract session patterns and save memory on session end
Load memory files and check for incomplete tasks
